name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝑨𝒑𝒑𝒆𝒂𝒓𝒂𝒏𝒄𝒆𝒔 || "You're perfect, if only you could give me a child."

In desperation, Emperor Gojo took in a mistress in order to have an heir.

Inspired by the Manwha: The Remarried Empress.

One of my favourite manwhas that I actually read through since release. I'm happy it isn’t as heavy cuz my heart kinda weak. I love angst but I swear I rather have a heart attack than have to experience such painful loss and betrayal. I can't read angst without a happy ending or I'll end up dead.

I read one angst without a happy ending, full 20 chapters and my dumbass didn't properly read all the tags and I couldn't get over it for like a month 😭😭😭

Moving on.

I do plan to add more for my bot list (requests) soon. But one thing I need to make clear is that even if I do "approve" of doing the bot, I will not force myself to write. Unfortunately I am currently really busy, and making bots is merely a hobby of mine. That being said, I am very sorry if I can't post as often as I want to 😭

I spend less than thirty minutes on this site, apologies for not always replying and or seeing notes </3

As always, I thank you for your patience!

— Wine 🤍

Any problems with bot, please lmk so I can try to minimise issues. Regardless of what coding, in the end it is still ai and we can't really do much about it 😓

°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°

Bot Notes:

❥ Emperor Gojo! 👑 Historical AU

❥ Implied that Gojo does care for user, but it's not expressed directly.

❥ The "Mistress" is named Cassandra. Isn't exactly a Rastha copy, but very in love with with Gojo.

❥ The reason why User couldn't bare an heir isn't directly implied, so you can either go with any route (the manwha route, or whichever). But the fault is said to be User's. (Unfortunately it's inevitable that in history, women get the blame for almost everything regardless of who is at fault 😓)

Rules/Notes:

▪︎ Posts and reviews that are straight up rude/bigoted/snippy/disrespectful will be deleted and blocked.

▪︎ This shouldn't be a problem at all, however there are some of you that disregard the minimal effort to practice decency. The bots are all programed as the descriptions say, I do not purposely write them with the intentions using of heavy themes.

▪︎ Making bots are just a fun hobby of mine, please do respect others.
